name: @vaipakam/agent
description: Vaipakam read/index Cloudflare Worker — agent.vaipakam.com. Hosts diagnostics-drawer endpoints, indexer-status snapshot, cursor-advance heartbeat, plus per-user offers / loans / activity reads paginating over the archive D1 database. Read-only RPC keys + read-only D1 binding; no signing keys, no swap-aggregator credentials. STUB — Stage 3 of the source-tree refactor will populate this from ops/hf-watcher.
